name: gate-stress
description: 3-stage pipeline to stress-test supervisor gates: stage 1 produces minimal output (gate may retry), stage 2 builds on it, stage 3 is independent (tests topo sort with parallel-ready deps)

stages.name: draft
stages.prompt: Write exactly ONE sentence describing what a pipeline orchestrator does. Just one sentence, nothing more. Write it to the output file.

stages.name: expand
stages.prompt: Read the previous stage's output (one sentence about pipeline orchestrators). Expand it into a 3-bullet feature list. Write the bullets to the output file. Reference the original sentence to prove you read $prev.

stages.name: summarize
stages.prompt: Write a one-line summary suitable for a README badge: 'Pipeline orchestrator: <10 words>'. Write it to the output file.
